name: 道の駅 いんない
desc: 日本有数75基の石橋群が点在する「院内」の道の駅。オオサンショウウオのはく製展示もあり、郷土料理「いしばし茶屋」の宇佐唐揚げ定食が人気。
descEn: Located in Innai, home to one of Japan's largest concentrations of stone bridges, with 75 in the area. Also displays a taxidermied giant salamander, and the Usa fried chicken set meal at the Ishibashi Chaya restaurant is popular.
